entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 29
entries.excerpt: Jacob continued his way, came to a well, and saw Rachel. She came with the flock, barefoot, in shabby clothing, and her face was burned by the sun. Jacob understood that He who had sent the beautiful Rebekah to the spring was sending the lowly Rachel to the well, and he shows her his strength: he rolled away the stone that covered the well, which many strong men could scarcely move. And having espoused Rachel to God by this wonderful deed, he himself was also betrothed to her by a kiss.…
